rationale: The cited paper directly studies cross-cultural differences in consumer impatience/time discounting and uses cultural priming, while the citing paper’s core question is how a cultural belief (PDB) affects impulsive/ unplanned buying beyond individualism-collectivism. Given this strong construct overlap (culture-driven immediacy/impulse behavior) and the citing paper’s stated aim to extend cross-cultural consumer research, this citation is plausibly a substantive conceptual/empirical antecedent rather than an obvious incidental mention.
